testcase.name: AI Ecosystem › view agents and models
Dashboard Navigation › should render sidebar and navigate to all main sections
Monitoring & Audit › view alerts and shadow AI
Security & Policies › create and publish policy from dashboard
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › security-policies.spec.ts:10:3 › Security & Policies › create and publish policy from dashboard Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('E2E Deny Critical') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('E2E Deny Critical') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

testcase.name: System Settings › view bundles and sync
